name: node1_non_llm_gpu_lab_nsight_compute_pass
description: Representative Nsight Compute profiling workloads for the local Node1 non-LLM GPU inference lab.

workloads.name: isp_sobel_mag
workloads.title: ISP Sobel magnitude CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles the tiled ISP Sobel magnitude CUDA path over a synthetic frame.

workloads.name: sparse_roi
workloads.title: Sparse ROI crop/resize/normalize CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles sparse active-tile ROI extraction and normalize over synthetic sparse motion.

workloads.name: mixed_region
workloads.title: Mixed-region grouped crop CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles connected-component grouping and batched crop/resize/normalize for mixed regions.

workloads.name: dense_full_frame
workloads.title: Dense full-frame diff/histogram/reduction CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles dense full-frame diff, histogram, reduction, lighting delta, and normalize kernels.

workloads.name: overlay_heavy
workloads.title: Overlay heatmap/thumbnail CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles overlay alpha blend, motion heatmap, and thumbnail generation kernels.

workloads.name: audiobox
workloads.title: AudioBox RMS/peak/onset/sync CUDA path
workloads.description: Profiles synthetic audio RMS, peak, onset, and sync-drift CUDA kernels.
